reason: Temporal subordinate connector 'enquanto/durante todo o periodo'; a discourse/clause-linking item with no dedicated temporal N4 topic, so it lands in advanced connectors.
Sibling of 間: punctual action inside a larger period; temporal clause connector belongs with advanced connectors.
Degree adverb requiring a negative ('nao muito'); no named N4 adverb/degree bucket, so it falls to the discourse/connectors catch-all.
Sequential temporal connector 'depois de X'; clause-linking item with no dedicated temporal topic goes to advanced connectors.
〜ば is one of the four conditionals; the conditionals topic explicitly names たら/ば/と/なら.
場合は = 'no caso de', a hypothetical/conditional situational pattern; fits the condicionais bucket.
Restrictive/limiting particle ('so, nada alem de') plus 〜たばかり aspect; no named restrictive-particle topic, defaults to the discourse catch-all.
Restrictive 'so com / apenas por meio de' (だけ + で); a limiting/discourse construction with no dedicated topic, so advanced connectors.
Compound-verb auxiliary marking sudden onset of an action ('desatar a/sair'); an aspectual nuance, fitting the aspect topic.
Ultra-polite copula of service/teineigo speech; belongs in basic keigo.
Sentence-final confirmation/emphasis/surprise marker; a discourse-modal device with no specific topic, so advanced connectors/discourse.
X が必要 = 'X e necessario / precisa-se de X', expressing need; aligns with the obligation/necessity topic.
prereq: が marker (topic 10); な-adjective 必要

reason: Idiomatic 〜がする for involuntary sensory perception (smell/sound/feeling); no N4 topic names perception, so it falls to the discourse catch-all as the least-bad home.
〜がり nominalizes the 〜がる 'shows-signs-of-feeling' family (寒がり); the appearance/conjecture topic houses the observable-emotion 〜がる cluster.
〜がる describes others' feelings via observable behavior (appearance of emotion); fits the aparencia/suposicao topic per the appearance rule.
Very polite form of ある and base for でございます; service-speech keigo.
Number + しか〜ない is a restrictive 'somente' with obligatory negative; restrictive particle with no dedicated topic, so the discourse catch-all.
〜は〜の一つだ = 'X e um dos Y', a noun-predication/discourse framing structure with no specific topic; defaults to advanced connectors/discourse.
prereq: は + の + copula (topic 7); superlative 一番 (topic 14)

reason: 〜ない〜はない double-negation for universal emphasis; an emphatic discourse construction with no dedicated home, so advanced connectors.
すこしも〜ない = 'nem um pouco', a degree adverb reinforcing total negation; degree/discourse item with no specific topic, so the catch-all.
すくなくない is a litotes negative of an い-adjective ('nao sao poucos'); a rhetorical/discourse adjective form with no dedicated topic, so advanced connectors.
Verb せる・させる is the causative form (make/let someone do); exactly the causative topic.
ように〜てほしい uses ように 'de modo que/para que' for an indirect wish; the advanced-connectors topic explicitly lists 〜ように.
prereq: て-form (topic 15); 〜てほしい; ように

reason: 〜ているあいだに = 'enquanto ... -ndo', a temporal subordinate clause on the て-form/ている; clause-linking item belongs with advanced connectors.
〜てくれてありがとう thanks for a favor done for me, built on てくれる; the give-and-receive (dar-receber) topic.
てくれない・てもらえない soften requests via negative くれる/もらう; built on the give/receive verbs, so dar-receber.
〜のだろうか is self-directed conjecture 'sera que...?' combining のだ + だろう; the appearance/conjecture topic houses でしょう/だろう.
prereq: plain form (topic 20); のだ; だろう

reason: お〜する is the humble (kenjogo) construction for one's own actions toward a superior; clearly the keigo topic.
いたす is the humble (kenjōgo) equivalent of する; belongs with basic keigo.
ほかに(も)/ほか(に)は adds further items/exceptions in discourse; fits advanced connectors.
たとえば is a discourse adverb introducing examples; advanced connectors bucket.
れる・られる potential form = ability/possibility; the dedicated potential topic.
んだけど・んですが is explanatory の + soft contrastive けど/が, a conversational connector.
prereq: explanatory の/ん; けど/が (taught N5 top 18)

reason: ないと is colloquial 'have to' (short for ないといけない); obligation bucket.
しか〜ない is a restrictive particle ('only') with no dedicated N4 thematic bucket; placed at the earliest N4 foundation topic.
だけでなく ('not only...but also') links/adds clauses; advanced connectors bucket.
もし is the adverb that flags a conditional clause; belongs with the conditionals.
し〜し lists/stacks reasons ('and besides'); a connector of clauses.
でできる・からできる ('made of/from' with できる) is a material-description pattern with no thematic N4 bucket; earliest N4 foundation topic.
prereq: particles で/から; できる

reason: と〜と、どちらが is two-item comparison; comparison is an N5 theme (top 14) with no N4 equivalent, so placed at earliest N4 topic.
ようにいう (indirect command 'tell to do') is built on ように, which the connectors topic teaches.
ようにいのる ('pray/hope that') is built on ように; same bucket as ように.
化する ('-ize/-ify') forms change/transformation verbs from nouns; fits the experience-and-change theme.
命令形 (plain imperative) is a verb-mood conjugation; closest mood bucket is volitive/intention (no imperative-specific topic).
ように ('so that / in order to') is explicitly named in the advanced-connectors objectives.
って感じ is a casual spoken 'kind of/vibe' expression; fits the casual-register theme.
とみえる ('apparently, seems from evidence') is conjecture/inference; appearance-and-conjecture bucket.
風 ('-style/-like, in the manner of') expresses resemblance/appearance; fits the appearance bucket.
がみられる ('is observed/can be seen') is a passive/potential of 見る used for appearance/observation; thematically fits appearance (alternatively passive top 31).
〜でも〜でも ('both X and Y / whether X or Y') is a concessive listing structure, akin to ても in the connectors bucket.
それで ('so/therefore') is a cause-consequence sentence connector; discourse-connector bucket.
Question-phrase + か (embedded questions / indefinite pronouns) is a discourse-level embedding device; placed in the discourse-connectors bucket.
とかんがえられている ('it is thought that') is the passive of 考える for consensus; passive bucket.
とされている ('is considered/said to be') is the passive of する; passive bucket.
〜ばよかった (regret 'should have') is built on the ば conditional; conditionals bucket.
〜たらどうですか (advice 'why don't you') is built on the たら conditional; conditionals bucket.
〜おう is the informal volitive (vamos/vou fazer), the casual form of ましょう — core to the intention/volitive topic.
〜てすみません is a fixed apology expression built on the て-form; no dedicated apology bucket, best housed among advanced discourse/politeness routines.
ません is the polite non-past negative of ます; as a form/register review item it fits the earliest N4 form topic.
〜れば is the ば conditional ('se A, então B') — squarely the conditionals topic.
〜てしまう (completion/regret) is a て-based aspectual auxiliary, the defining content of the aspect topic.
This is 〜てほしい (wanting another person to do something for you), a て-based favor/desire directed at others — pairs with the give/receive favors topic.
〜のような is the noun-modifying simile/comparison of the よう family taught with appearance/conjecture (そう/よう/みたい).
〜のように is the adverbial simile/comparison of the よう family (like X), grouped with the appearance/conjecture よう forms.
だんだん ('gradually, more and more') is a change-over-time adverb that pairs naturally with なる/ようになる in the change topic.
どんどん ('more and more, rapidly') is a progressive-change adverb, best paired with the なる/change topic.
〜たら is the most versatile conditional ('se/quando'), core to the conditionals topic.
だが・ですが are adversative conjunctions ('mas/porém') — advanced sentence connectors.
なくて is the negative て-form linking clauses (cause/state); as a negative-form connective it fits the early N4 form topic.
Verb［れる・られる］ is the passive voice — the passive topic.
他動詞・自動詞 are transitive/intransitive verb pairs — exactly the transitivity topic.
〜なおす ('redo/correct') is a compound-verb suffix that nuances an action; fits the action-nuancing aspect topic.
まず ('first, to begin with') is a discourse-sequencing adverb that organizes steps — belongs with advanced connectors/discourse.
また ('again / also, moreover') functions as an additive discourse connector.
ごろ (approximate-time suffix) has no dedicated N4 time bucket; placed in the earliest N4 topic as a lexical/time review item.
とうとう ('finally/at last') marks the culmination of a process over time, aligning with the change/result theme.
ごとに ('each/every' interval) is a lexical quantity/interval expression with no thematic N4 bucket; placed in the earliest N4 topic.
なるべく ('as much as possible') softens an intention or request; loosely tied to the intention/volitive topic.
〜るところだ ('about to do') marks an aspectual/temporal point of an action — fits the action-nuancing aspect topic.
そういう ('that kind of') is an anaphoric demonstrative referencing prior discourse; no demonstrative N4 bucket, placed with discourse connectors.
ぜんぜん (degree adverb reinforcing negation, 'not at all') is a lexical adverb with no thematic N4 bucket; placed in the earliest N4 topic.
がる describes observable signs of a third person's feelings/desires (outward appearance of emotion) — aligns with the appearance/conjecture topic.
みたいに・みたいな is the informal みたい comparison/conjecture, taught with appearance/conjecture (そう/よう/らしい/みたい).
のように・のような is the formal comparison/simile of the よう family, grouped with appearance/conjecture よう forms.
〜ようと思う = volitional base + 思う to state intention/decision; topic 24 explicitly lists 〜ようと思う.
〜くなる/〜になる expresses change of state with なる; topic 27 covers なる/mudança.
〜くする/〜にする is the agentive change-of-state counterpart to なる, taught with the change cluster in topic 27.
prereq: adjective adverbial 〜く/〜に form; contrast with なる (gp-79)

reason: 〜くは(ない) uses the adjective 〜く adverbial form (soft/contrastive negation); placed with the 〜く-form cluster (gp-79/gp-80) at the earliest N4 topic that introduces it.
〜といいです (hope/wish) is structurally built on the と conditional (と=se/quando + いい); conditionals are taught in topic 22.
Dominant form 〜まい is negative volitional/determination (plus のように comparison); negative volition fits the volitional/intention bucket 24.
聞こえる = spontaneous/potential perception (can hear); paired with 見える and taught alongside the potential cluster in topic 23.
見える = spontaneous/potential perception (can see); the visual pair of 聞こえる, taught with potential in topic 23.
〜代 is a lexical noun suffix for cost/fee; no thematic N4 number/money topic exists, so it goes to the generic earliest N4 entry (topic 20).
かかる (time/price) is lexical time/cost grammar with no dedicated N4 number/money topic; placed at the generic earliest N4 entry.
ほとんど is a degree/quantity adverb with no dedicated N4 adverb topic; placed at the generic earliest N4 entry.
そんな/こんな/あんな/どんな are demonstrative adjectives; demonstratives are an N5 topic (8) with no N4 equivalent, so the N4 form goes to the generic earliest N4 entry.
各 is a lexical 'each' prefix with no thematic N4 home; placed at the generic earliest N4 entry.
〜の次に is a sequencing expression ('next/after'); no dedicated N4 sequence topic, so the generic earliest N4 entry.
以上 ('X or more') is quantity/number grammar; no N4 number topic exists, placed at the generic earliest N4 entry.
以下 ('X or less') is quantity/number grammar; no N4 number topic exists, placed at the generic earliest N4 entry.
以外 ('except/besides') is a lexical exclusion noun-suffix; no thematic N4 home, placed at the generic earliest N4 entry.
ずっと is a duration adverb with no dedicated N4 adverb topic; placed at the generic earliest N4 entry.
だいたい is an approximation adverb with no dedicated N4 adverb topic; placed at the generic earliest N4 entry.
〜のなかで sets the comparison/superlative domain ('among/of all'); comparisons are an N5 topic (14) with no N4 equivalent, so the N4 form goes to the generic earliest N4 entry.
何+counter+か (indefinite quantity 'some/several') is number/counter grammar; no N4 number topic exists, placed at the generic earliest N4 entry.
真(っ) is a lexical intensifier prefix with no thematic N4 home; placed at the generic earliest N4 entry.
〜始める is an aspectual compound auxiliary verb (inceptive 'begin to'); topic 29 handles action aspect/nuance.
〜はずです expresses logical expectation/conjecture ('should be'); topic 30 covers inference/conjecture (はず listed in spec).
はずがない is the negative-conviction conjecture ('impossible that'); same inference bucket as はず, topic 30.
必要がある ('there is a need to / must') expresses obligation/necessity; topic 28 covers obligation.
prereq: dictionary form + necessity noun 必要

reason: 意向形 is the volitional form itself; topic 24 (volitivo e intenção) is its dedicated home.
いらっしゃる is a sonkeigo honorific verb; topic 33 covers keigo (sonkeigo/kenjogo).
prereq: polite register; verbs いる/行く/来る

reason: いたします is the polite form of the humble verb いたす (kenjōgo for する); humble/honorific language is keigo.
じゃないか is a casual sentence-final tag (じゃない + か) for seeking agreement/rhetorical emphasis; belongs to casual register built on plain negative.
prereq: plain negative じゃない; casual register

reason: かどうか embeds an indirect yes/no question (whether or not) inside a larger clause; a discourse/clause-linking device.
かしら is a casual sentence-final particle expressing self-directed doubt; pure casual-register feature.
かい is an informal yes/no question-ending particle; a casual-register sentence-final marker.
かもしれない expresses possibility/conjecture (talvez, pode ser que), the inference theme.
かな is a casual, gender-neutral sentence-final particle for musing/doubt; casual-register feature.
から作る states the raw material something is made from (chemical transformation); it describes/qualifies a noun, with no dedicated material topic at N4.
prereq: から; 作る (できる material constructions)

reason: きっと is an adverb of conviction (certainly) that pairs with conjecture forms (でしょう/はず); inference/supposition theme.
prereq: conjecture forms でしょう/はず

reason: 頃(ころ/ごろ) is an approximate-time marker; N4 has no time-expression topic, so it lands in the broad foundational N4 bucket.
こと nominalizes a verb/clause (the act/fact of); a noun-modification/nominalization tool taught alongside relative clauses.
〜たことがある expresses past experience (already done something); explicit experience theme.
ことができる expresses ability/possibility (conseguir/poder fazer); the potential/capacity theme.
ことになる marks something decided (often by circumstance); decision/intention theme alongside つもり/volitional.
ことにする expresses a decision made by one's own will (decidi/resolvi); intention/decision theme.
くする means to make something become [adj] (deliberate change); the change/become cluster (なる/ようになる counterpart).
急に is a manner adverb (suddenly); N4 has no adverb topic, so it lands in the broad foundational N4 bucket.
までに marks a time deadline (by/until at the latest); a temporal particle with no dedicated N4 time topic.
まま links an unchanged state to another action (do Y while X stays as-is); a clause-linking device akin to ながら.
または is an 'or' conjunction joining alternatives; a connector.
〜みたいだ expresses informal conjecture/resemblance (parece que); the appearance/supposition theme.
みたいな is the noun-modifying form of みたいだ (resemblance/comparison); appearance/supposition cluster.
みたいに is the adverbial form of みたいだ (like/in the manner of); appearance/comparison cluster.
など lists non-exhaustive examples (etc./such as); a listing/connective device.
〜ながら links two simultaneous actions by the same agent (while doing); a clause connector.
なかなか〜ない is a degree adverb plus negative (not easily); an adverb+negation pattern with no dedicated topic, building on plain negative.
なければいけない expresses obligation/necessity (tenho que); the obligation theme.
なければならない expresses obligation/necessity (general/social nuance); the obligation theme.
なら is one of the four conditionals (たら/ば/と/なら), which is exactly the theme of topic 22.

～なさい is a soft top-down imperative tied to register/authority; closest N4 fit is the register/formality bucket (keigo). No dedicated imperative topic exists; placed by register theme after plain form.
なさる is sonkeigo (honorific form of する); belongs squarely in the keigo topic.
に気がつく ('notice/realize') is a lexical/collocational expression with no special grammar dependency; placed in the earliest N4 topic as a vocabulary-style item.
に見える expresses appearance/seeming based on visual impression, matching the appearance/conjecture topic (そう/よう/らしい/みたい).
～にくい (difficult-to-do) is a verb-stem suffix with no thematic N4 bucket of its own; placed in the earliest N4 topic, requiring only the verb masu-stem.

の中で marks the set within which a comparison/superlative is made; comparatives/superlatives are an N5 theme (top:n5-comparacoes) but this item is N4, so it goes to the earliest N4 topic; no later dependency.
のに (unexpected contrast, 'although/despite') is explicitly named in the advanced-connectors topic objectives.
のは〜だ is a cleft/focus construction nominalizing a clause with の; it builds on nominalization and is a discourse/structuring device, fitting the advanced-connectors/discourse bucket.
お～ください is a sonkeigo honorific request, more polite than てください; belongs in the keigo topic.
お～になる is the sonkeigo honorific construction for elevating another's actions; core keigo topic content.
おきに ('every X interval') is a quantity/interval expression with no special grammar dependency or thematic N4 bucket; placed in the earliest N4 topic.
終わる as an auxiliary (食べ終わる 'finish doing') nuances the completion aspect of an action, matching the aspect topic (てみる/ておく/てしまう).
～られる is taught primarily as the potential form (also passive); the potential topic 23 comes before passive 31, so place at the earliest fitting topic (potential).
らしい (inference from external information / appearance) is explicitly named in the appearance/conjecture topic.
～さ nominalizes adjectives (高い→高さ); adjective-derived forms attach early. No N4 bucket names it, so it goes to the earliest N4 topic; depends only on adjectives (N5).
さっき ('a moment ago') is a casual time adverb with no grammar dependency; fits the casual-register/earliest N4 topic.
～させられる is the causative-passive, explicitly named in topic 32 (causativa e causativa-passiva).
prereq: causative ～させる and passive ～られる (built on top:n4-causativa & top:n4-passiva)

reason: ～させる is the causative, the core of topic 32.
させてください is the causative-て + ください permission request; builds directly on the causative, so it belongs in the causative topic 32.
prereq: causative ～させる (top:n4-causativa); て-form; ください

reason: さすが ('as expected/impressive') is a lexical adverbial expression with no grammar dependency or dedicated N4 bucket; placed in the earliest N4 topic.
～し enumerates reasons/characteristics ('and besides'), a discourse-connecting device fitting the advanced-connectors topic.
そんなに ('that much/so') is a demonstrative-based degree adverb with no grammar dependency or thematic N4 bucket; placed in the earliest N4 topic.
それでも ('even so/nevertheless') is a sentence-initial contrastive conjunction, fitting the advanced-connectors/discourse topic.
それに ('moreover/besides') is an additive sentence-connector, fitting the advanced-connectors/discourse topic.
～そうです here is the hearsay/reportive そうだ (伝聞), part of the appearance/conjecture cluster (そう/よう/らしい/みたい).
そうな/そうに are the adverbial/adnominal forms of the appearance-そう (様態), part of the appearance/conjecture topic.
prereq: appearance ～そう (top:n4-suposicao); verb masu-stem / adjective stem

reason: 〜たばかり ('just did') expresses the recency/completion nuance of an action, fitting the aspect topic best; depends on the past plain (た) form.
たところだ marks the just-completed aspectual phase of an action (acabar de); aspect/ところ nuance bucket.
Explicitly the transitive/intransitive verb-pair contrast (他動詞・自動詞), the exact theme of topic 25.
prereq: verb pairs + を/が particle choice

reason: たがる infers a third person's desire from observable signs (appearance/conjecture cluster); adjective(たい)-derived so ≥13, N4 so ≥20.
Core たら conditional; conditionals bucket (たら/ば/と/なら) is topic 22.
たらどうですか suggestion is built directly on the たら conditional; goes with conditionals topic 22.
たらいいですか asks for guidance via the たら conditional; depends on たら so placed with conditionals 22.
てあげる is the giving-a-favor verb (あげる); give/receive bucket is topic 26; built on て-form so ≥15.
てほしい (want another to do X) is the て-form interpersonal-desire pattern taught with the give/receive favor cluster; built on て-form.
ていく adds directional/progressive aspect (away/into the future) to the て-form; aspect bucket 29.
ていた is past progressive/state (ている-based nuance); aspect bucket 29 (ている taught at 15, N4 so ≥20).
ていただけませんか is a humble-keigo polite request (potential-negative of いただく); fits keigo topic 33; built on て-form.
てくれる = someone does a favor for me (くれる); give/receive bucket 26; built on て-form.
てくる adds directional/inceptive aspect (toward speaker / up to now) to て-form; aspect bucket 29.
てみる (try doing) is an explicit member of the aspect bucket per the rules (てみる→29).
てもらう = receive the benefit of an action (もらう); give/receive bucket 26; built on て-form.
ておく (do in advance/preparation) is an explicit member of the aspect bucket per the rules (ておく→29).
てしまう/ちゃう (completion / regret) is an explicit member of the aspect bucket per the rules (てしまう→29).
てすみません is a fixed interactional discourse formula (apology for an action) built on て-form; no dedicated apology bucket, so the discourse/connectors topic 34 is the closest fit.
てやる = do a favor downward (やる); give/receive favor bucket 26; built on て-form.
てよかった evaluates a past action with relief/glad; closest thematic N4 bucket is experience/change (looking back at a completed fact); built on て-form.
ているところ marks being in the middle of an action (aspectual phase via ところ); aspect bucket 29.
〜ても (concession, even if) is explicitly listed for the advanced-connectors bucket (〜ても→34).
と言ってもいい (one may say that) is a quotative discourse hedge; fits advanced discourse connectors topic 34.
〜という〜 names/defines via noun modification (clause/name modifying a following noun); fits the noun-modification/relative-clauses topic 21.
ということ nominalizes a whole clause into a noun block (clause-to-noun modification); fits noun-modification/relative-clauses topic 21.
と言われている (it is said / hearsay) reports common belief; fits the inference/hearsay cluster of topic 30 (らしい/そう/hearsay).
prereq: と quotative + passive 言われる

reason: と聞いた (I heard that, hearsay/reported info) fits the inference/hearsay cluster of topic 30.
と思う (state an opinion) requires plain form before と; the N5 intro is at topic 18, so the N4 re-encounter belongs with plain-form usage in topic 20.
Listing/enumerating examples (とか〜とか) is a discourse-connector device; no earlier N4 bucket fits enumeration.
Marks the temporal stage/aspect of an action (about to / in progress / just finished), so it belongs with action-aspect nuances.
Auxiliary verb on the verb stem meaning the action continues — an aspectual nuance of an action.
受身形 is literally the passive voice — the dedicated passive topic.
Topic-plus-contrast pattern (は…が…、…は…) chaining two contrasted ideas is advanced discourse linking.
Verb-stem + やすい turns an action into 'easy to do'; an action-nuance derivative grouped with づらい — no dedicated ease/difficulty bucket exists.
Adverb 'finally/at last' marks the culmination/completion of an awaited action; nearest fit is the completion-aspect bucket. No adverb bucket exists.
Comparison particle 'than'; comparison has no dedicated N4 topic, so it lands with the advanced-degree/connector bucket (which holds ば〜ほど).
予定だ states a concrete scheduled plan — intention/plans bucket (alongside つもり, ようと思う).
Casual volitional form (〜よう) expressing suggestion/personal decision — the volitive/intention topic.
ように/ような ('like/as', 'so that') is explicitly named in the advanced-connectors objectives (〜ように).
ようと思う = volitional + 思う = 'intend/thinking of doing'; explicitly listed under the volitive/intention topic.
Adverb reinforcing a wish/invitation ('by all means'); pairs with intention/wish expressions. No N4 invitation or adverb bucket exists.
Adverb 全然 paired with negation ('not at all'); no adverb bucket, placed with advanced discourse/adverbial linking.
Verb-stem + づらい turns an action into 'hard/uncomfortable to do'; same family as やすい, an action-nuance derivative.
Casual contraction of てはいけない (prohibition), built on the て-form taught in topic 15.
The copula だ/です — the foundational identification topic.
Limiting/focus particle 'only'; attaches to nouns and is grouped with the basic particle cluster. No dedicated quantifier-particle bucket exists.
Casual conjecture/probability ('probably', seeking agreement 'né?'); fits opinion/discourse where probability is expressed.
Particle で (place of action, means/instrument) — the で/に/へ/と location-and-means topic.
でも as the contrastive conjunction 'but/however' — fits contrasting/discourse-connecting objectives (が/けど).
でしょう = polite probability / seeking agreement; expressing likelihood and opinion fits the discourse/opinion topic.
どんな ('what kind of') is a question word — the questions-and-demonstratives topic.
どうして ('why') is a question word — the question-words topic.
どうやって ('how/by what means') is a question word — the question-words topic.
が marks the grammatical subject — explicitly covered in the verbs topic alongside を and が.
あります expresses existence of inanimate things, taught with ある/いる + place particles
〜がほしい = wanting a thing; topic 14 objective explicitly covers 〜たい/〜がほしい (desejos)
います expresses existence of animate beings; pairs with ある・いる + place in topic 11
です is the polite copula, the founding content of topic 7 (は + です)
そこ is a こ-そ-あ-ど place demonstrative; topic 8 covers demonstratives and question words
あそこ is a こ-そ-あ-ど place demonstrative; topic 8 covers demonstratives
がある = existence of inanimate things; taught with ある・いる + place in topic 11
がいる = existence of animate beings; taught with ある・いる + place in topic 11
〜てはいけません is prohibition built on the て-form; te-form taught in topic 15
この is an adnominal demonstrative (こ-そ-あ-ど); topic 8 covers demonstratives
〜のほうが〜より is the core comparison structure; topic 14 covers より/一番
〜く is the adverbial form of い-adjectives; adjective-derived → topic ≥13
〜になる is change of state with nouns/な-adjectives; depends on adjectives taught in topic 13
〜たり lists example actions (built on た-form); best fits connecting-ideas discourse topic 18, after past (12)
〜たりする closes the 〜たり listing; same placement as たり in topic 18, after past form
〜なくちゃいけない (contraction of なくては) is te-based negative obligation; clusters with permission/prohibition in topic 15
その is an adnominal demonstrative (こ-そ-あ-ど); topic 8 covers demonstratives
あの is an adnominal demonstrative (こ-そ-あ-ど); topic 8 covers demonstratives
〜んです・のです gives explanation/context; fits discourse/opinion topic 18
へいく uses direction particle へ + 行く; topic 11 covers で/に/へ/と direction
する is a core irregular verb; introduced with verbs in topic 10
これ is a core demonstrative pronoun; topic 7 objective explicitly names これ/それ/あれ
くる is a core irregular verb; introduced with verbs in topic 10
好き is a な-adjective taking が; topic 13 objective covers 好き/上手 + が
きらい is a な-adjective taking が (opposite of 好き); topic 13 covers gostos with が
〜のがすきです expresses liking an activity (nominalized + 好き + が); extends 好き in topic 13
い-Adjectives くない is the negative of い-adjectives; topic 13 covers adjectives (presente/passado/negativo)
けど・だけど is a contrastive conjunction; topic 18 objective covers contrast (が/けど)
Defines the て-form itself, which is the dedicated subject of topic 15.
へ marks direction/destination of movement; topic 11 explicitly teaches で/に/へ/と.
～にいく expresses purpose of a movement (に + motion verb); fits the direction/place bucket (topic 11).
誰 is the question word 'who'; topic 8 teaches interrogatives.
それ is a こそあど demonstrative; topic 7 objectives explicitly cover これ/それ/あれ.
なぜ is the interrogative 'why'; belongs with the question-word topic 8.
なんで is the colloquial 'why' interrogative; question-word topic 8.
だった/でした is the past of the copula; past tense is taught in topic 12.
じゃない negates the present copula です/だ; copula family is introduced in topic 7.
じゃなかった is the past-negative copula ('was not'); past tense topic 12.
prereq: copula negation じゃない + past (topics 7,12)

reason: い-adjective negative-past (くなかった); adjective conjugation lives in topic 13.
Verb (た/ている) directly modifying a noun; the ている form is a prerequisite taught in topic 15, where verb-before-noun first becomes usable.
が/の subject marking inside a noun-modifying clause; depends on the verb-modifies-noun pattern (gp-36) introduced from topic 15.
どれ is the interrogative 'which one'; question-word/demonstrative topic 8.
どこ is the interrogative 'where'; question-word topic 8.
あれ is a こそあど demonstrative; topic 7 objectives explicitly cover これ/それ/あれ.
どの is the interrogative demonstrative 'which'; question-word/demonstrative topic 8.
たり～たりする lists representative actions (built on た-form); discourse/connecting-ideas topic 18, placed after past tense.
けっこう is a degree adverb; topic 17 covers adverbs (rotina, frequência e advérbios).
たくさん expresses large quantity/number; fits the numbers/quantity bucket (topic 9).
くらい/ぐらい marks approximate quantity/number/time; belongs with numbers and time, topic 9.
～になる/～くなる (change of state) is adjective-derived (く/に adverbial forms); adjective topic 13.
のなかで～がいちばん is the superlative pattern; comparisons/preferences topic 14.
より～のほうが is the two-item comparative; comparisons topic 14 (より/一番).
なにか/なにも are indefinite pronouns built from the question word なに; belongs with question words, topic 8.
誰か/どこか/誰も/どこも are indefinite pronouns from question words; question-word topic 8.
いい is an い-adjective with irregular conjugation; adjective topic 13.
たほうがいい gives advice/recommendation; closest N5 suggestion bucket is topic 16 (convites, sugestões). Built on past た-form and いい.
Negative advice 'é melhor não fazer'; opinion/advice fits late N5 discourse; builds on negative ない-form (topic 10) and ほうがいい.
Colloquial 'tenho que' (contraction of なくてはいけない); N5 obligation/negative cluster sits at 10-15, placed with other negative-based forms.
prereq: ない-form → なくては/なければ (negativo)

reason: へた + が = ruim em algo; mirrors 好き/上手 + が which is an explicit objective of the adjectives topic.
prereq: が + nominalizador の; adjetivo な へた

reason: じょうず + が = bom em algo; explicitly matches '好き/上手 + が' objective of the adjectives topic.
prereq: が + nominalizador の; adjetivo な じょうず

reason: あげる 'dar' (plain verb, not てform) needs に (recipient)/を; N5 give-receive belongs with the recipient-particle topic.
くれる 'dar (para mim)' plain verb; relies on に recipient marking taught with direction/recipient particles.
もらう 'receber' plain verb; needs に (from-whom) marking, grouped with the recipient-particle topic.
る-verb dictionary form; the verbs topic explicitly teaches dictionary form + ます.
う-verb dictionary form; explicitly the verbs topic (forma de dicionário + ます).
ます polite ending; explicitly named in the verbs topic objective (presente polido ます).
ここ is a こ・そ・あ・ど place demonstrative; the perguntas topic theme is demonstratives + question words.
～ほうがいい gives advice/recommendation (opinion); fits the late-N5 discourse/opinion topic.
い-adjectives are the core subject of the adjectives topic (い e な).
一番 superlative; explicitly named in the comparisons topic objective (より/一番).
一緒に 'juntos' appears in invitations/agreements; fits the convites/interação topic theme.
いつも is a frequency adverb; the rotina topic explicitly teaches frequency adverbs.
Negative of copula だ/です; belongs with the copula です topic (basic identification).
Question particle か is explicitly listed for the desu-wa topic (sim/não com です e は).
か～か 'ou' offers alternatives/choices; builds on the か particle and fits the questions topic.
～から 'porque' is explicitly named in the conectando topic objective (justificar から/ので).
方 'maneira de' attaches to the ます-stem (≥10); a nominalizer with no dedicated home, placed in the late-N5 discourse catch-all.
けど 'mas' contrast; explicitly named in conectando objective (contrastar が/けど).
けれども is the fuller form of けど (contrast); same home as けど in the conectando topic.
まだ 'ainda/ainda não' is an adverb; fits the rotina topic that teaches adverbs.
まだ～ていません combines adverb まだ with ています negative; depends on て-form (topic 15) so ≥15, grouped with まだ in rotina.
prereq: て-form → ています (topic 15) + まだ

reason: まで 'até' marks a spatial/temporal endpoint (東京まで行きます); fits the place/direction particle topic.
～まえに 'antes de' is a temporal sequencing connector (counterpart of てから); fits the connecting-ideas topic; uses dictionary form (≥10).
～ませんか is the polite invitation 'vamos...?'; explicitly the convites/sugestões topic.
～ましょう makes suggestions/invitations 'vamos fazer', exactly the convites/sugestões objective (ましょう/ませんか).
～ましょうか offers/suggests doing together, same invitation-and-offer family as ましょう/ませんか in convites.
も is a basic 'also' topic-marker particle, grouped with the foundational は/も/の/です markers in topic 7.
もう ('já / não mais') is a frequency/time adverb, fitting the advérbios objective of the rotina topic.
Sentence-final な is an emphasis/exclamation particle, belonging with the ね/よ final-particle objective of topic 12; prohibition use needs dictionary form.
prereq: dictionary-form verb (topic 10) for the proibição use

reason: な-adjectives are one of the two adjective classes taught directly in the adjetivos topic.
なあ is a sentence-final emotion/exclamation particle, same final-particle family as ね/よ in topic 12.
〜ないで ('without doing / don't do') is the negative counterpart of the て-form connector, taught alongside the て-form cluster.
ないでください is the direct negative of てください (requests), so it sits with the て-form requests in topic 15.
N5 obligation 'tenho que fazer' built on the ない-form; grouped with the permission/prohibition (てもいい/てはいけない) cluster in topic 15.
〜なくてもいい ('não precisa') is the negative pair of てもいい permission, taught in the て-form permission cluster.
なくちゃ is the colloquial obligation form from なくては, sitting with the N5 obligation/permission cluster on the て-form.
N5 obligation 'tenho que fazer' via double-negative on the negative て-form; grouped with the て-form permission/prohibition cluster.
N5 obligation form on the negative て-form, paired with the other なくては obligation forms in topic 15.
なる ('tornar-se') is taught with adjectives via 〜くなる/〜になる change-of-state, so it follows the adjetivos topic.
んです gives explanation/justification ('é que...'), matching the discourse/justify objective of the conectando topic.
prereq: plain-form predicate, から/ので reasoning context

reason: ね is the confirmation final particle explicitly named in topic 12's objective (ênfase/confirmação ね/よ).
に (time/destination/location/target) is one of the core place/direction particles で/に/へ/と taught in topic 11.
に/へ marks direction/destination of movement, exactly the で/に/へ/と objective of the place/direction topic.
に行く (purpose of going with movement verbs 行く/来る/帰る) belongs with the direction/destination topic 11.
〜にする expresses choosing/deciding between options ('vou de...'), fitting the preferences/choice theme of topic 14.
Possessive/linking particle の is one of the foundational markers (は/も/の) and is named in topic 7's objective.
のが下手 nominalizes a verb to state low skill with な-adjective 下手 + が, matching the 上手/好き + が objective in topic 13.
のが上手 states being good at an action via な-adjective 上手 + が, exactly the 上手 + が objective of topic 13.
のが好き expresses liking to do an action with 好き + が, which is the 好き + が objective listed in topic 13.
prereq: の nominalizer, 好き (な-adjective), が

reason: の中で[A]が一番 is the superlative construction, matching the 一番/comparison objective of topic 14.
ので marks cause/reason ('porque'), explicitly part of topic 18's から/ので justification objective.
お/ご honorific prefixes are foundational noun-level politeness markers; with no N5 keigo topic, they fit the earliest basic-politeness topic 7.
Pedir objeto educadamente com a partícula を (をください); pertence ao tópico onde を é ensinado.
を marca o objeto direto do verbo; objetivo explícito do tópico 10 (verbos + を/が).
Conjunção de contraste (porém/contudo) — encaixa em contrastar/justificar do tópico de discurso.
Conectivo de sequência/adição (e depois) entre frases — tópico de conectar ideias.
Conectivo aditivo entre frases (e/e então) — tópico de conectar ideias e discurso.
Grau/excesso (demais) sobre verbos e adjetivos; tema de intensidade/grau próximo a comparações e preferências.
prereq: adjetivos (radical い/な) e radical verbal ます

reason: Experiência (já fiz X) construído sobre a forma plana た; conceptualmente N4-experiência, mas item é n5, então vai ao tópico n5 mais tardio que pressupõe a forma た.
〜たい = desejo (quero fazer); objetivo explícito do tópico 14 (〜たい/〜がほしい).
Lista ações como exemplos (fazer coisas como X e Y) construído sobre a forma た; tópico de conectar/listar ações no fim do N5 (pressupõe た).
〜てある (estado resultante de ação intencional) é construído sobre a forma て; vai ao tópico que ensina a forma て.
て/で ligando qualidades (adjetivo-i + て, substantivo/adjetivo-na + で); depende de adjetivos, tópico 13.
A própria forma て — é exatamente o tópico 15.
〜ている (ação em curso/estado) listado explicitamente nos objetivos do tópico da forma て.
〜てから (depois de fazer X, faz Y) é sequência de ações na rotina; construído sobre a forma て (≥15), colocado em 17 para equilíbrio temático e evitar sobrecarregar o tópico 15.
〜てください (pedido educado) é objetivo explícito do tópico da forma て (pedidos com てください).
てはいけない (proibição) é construído sobre a forma て; agrupa-se com permissão/proibição no tópico 15.
〜てもいいです (permissão) é construído sobre a forma て; objetivo de permissão está no tópico 15.
Partícula と (lista fechada/companhia 'com'); a função de companhia (com quem) é objetivo do tópico 11 (で/に/へ/と).
とき = 'quando...' liga uma situação temporal a outra oração; conector subordinativo, encaixa no tópico de conectar ideias.
prereq: modificação de substantivo / formas plana e passada

reason: Advérbio de intensidade (muito) que reforça adjetivos; introduzido junto com adjetivos no tópico 13.
つもり = intenção/plano decidido; conceptualmente N4-volitivo, mas item é n5, então vai ao tópico n5 mais tardio (pressupõe forma de dicionário/plana).
って = versão coloquial de と para citação/tópico; função de citação e opinião alinha-se ao tópico de discurso (と思う).
はどうですか = 'que tal X?', sugestão/preferência educada; encaixa no tópico de preferências e sugestões.
prereq: です/か e partícula は

reason: は marcador de tópico — é o tópico fundacional 7 (o tópico は e o copula です).
は〜より...です = padrão básico de comparação (mais ... do que); objetivo explícito do tópico 14 (より/一番).
や lista substantivos como exemplos (entre outros); partícula de listagem agrupa-se com と no tópico 11 de partículas.
よ = partícula final de ênfase/aviso; objetivo do tópico 12 menciona marcar ênfase/confirmação (ね/よ).
より〜ほうが = comparação entre duas coisas (X é mais ~ que Y); objetivo central do tópico 14 (comparações).
